rules.headings: Use tracking-tight for H1-H3. Do not center-align by default.
rules.body: leading-relaxed for paragraphs. tracking-[0.2em] for overlines and labels.

color_palette.rules: Ensure high contrast (min 4.5:1 for body). Use tinted greys (slate) instead of pure grey to make the interface feel alive.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use standard Tailwind scale. Prioritize generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) for dashboard cards to avoid crowding.
layout_and_spacing.grid_strategy: Mode B: 'Control Room Grid'. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 for KPI dashboard widgets. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense data, labels, inputs, and tables for optimal scanning.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Flat solid backgrounds with crisp 1px borders (border-border). Soft hover shadows for interactive cards. Avoid heavy glassmorphism for data clarity.

components.forms_and_inputs: Use customized Shadcn UI components. Form labels must be left-aligned. Inputs should have subtle rounded-md corners.
components.tables: Shadcn Table for student lists. Implement hover rows and explicit column alignments.
components.tags_badges: High-contrast pill shapes for 'Medidas Educativas' (e.g., PEI, Adequação Curricular). Use varied but professional badge colors.
components.buttons: Clear primary CTA. Action and export buttons (CSV/PDF) should use secondary or outline variants.
components.navigation: Responsive sidebar layout (desktop sidebar, mobile hamburger). Top header for Breadcrumbs, User Profile, and Theme Toggle.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) with shadow-md. Links and buttons change brightness.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use specific transition properties (e.g., transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out, transition-transform).
interactions_and_motion.empty_loading: Use clear empty states for tables with no data. Skeleton loaders for initial dashboard fetches.

icons.rules: Consistent stroke width (1.5px or 2px). Use clear semantic icons for navigation (Dashboard, Users) and actions (Edit, Delete, Export).

image_urls.description: Modern educational building aesthetic for the split-screen login page background.
Students in a library; can be used for empty states or welcome banners.

media.rules: When placing text over images, use a max background overlay of bg-black/50 or bg-gradient-to-t for readability.

testing.attributes: Add data-testid attribute to all interactive and key informational elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs, dialogs) for robust automated testing. Format: kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='export-pdf-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a complete Sidebar/Header layout. The header must include the Light/Dark mode toggle (Theme switcher).
Login Page: Simple email/password form (mock auth if backend not provided) utilizing the provided 'auth_background' image on a split layout.
Dashboard Page: Display Recharts for statistics (total students, by class, by level, by school). Include KPI summary cards at the top.
Students (Alunos) Page: Implement a full CRUD interface.
Student List: A comprehensive Shadcn DataTable featuring search (Nome) and filters (Turma, Nível de Ensino).
Student Actions: Add 'Exportar CSV' and 'Exportar PDF' buttons near the table filters.

Student Form: Use Shadcn Form. Must include Nome, Idade, Turma, Escola, Nível de Ensino. For 'Medidas Educativas', implement a multi-select field for pre-defined tags AND a text area for free-text notes.
Language enforcement: Ensure all UI text is strictly Portuguese (Portugal) (e.g., 'Ecrã', 'Registo', 'Utilizadores', 'Detalhes do Aluno').
Install custom fonts via Next.js/Vite config or Google Fonts (Work Sans and IBM Plex Sans).
